response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack engineering with direct experience in the role's primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and current work on AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators, which precisely matches a key requirement. Strong background in testing, craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD), and multi-language proficiency across the secondary stack.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node/React stack with 10+ years full-stack experience
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work aligns with required AI agent development skill
Demonstrated craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Kotlin not listed; Java exposure is older and limited
No explicit cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK reference
